audit_findings.finding: TCP message unsanitized — title/message passed raw to termux-notification; oversized recv truncates mid-UTF8; no priority whitelist validation
audit_findings.remediation: Whitelist priority, strip control chars, cap length at 500

audit_findings.finding: Log truncation tail+mv has narrow race window under concurrent cron overlap
audit_findings.remediation: Use backup copy pattern or document flock coverage

audit_findings.finding: AGE variable uninitialized when LATEST missing; misleading HEALTH log across iterations
Hardcoded E:\x-tool paths break non-standard installs; no env-var override
audit_findings.remediation: Parameterize via CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR env or WSL mount detection

audit_findings.finding: No audit-log on received notifications despite being public interface
No audit-log on stale/resume state transitions
ScheduledTask example suggests Highest privilege unnecessarily
audit_findings.remediation: Document recommends Limited unless elevation needed
